script.source: String annotationFieldName = 'metadata.annotations'; String[] annotationProps = new String[] {'feature_category', 'feature_name'};  if (params._source[annotationFieldName] != null) {     StringBuilder builder = new StringBuilder();     builder.append('[');      for (annotation in params._source[annotationFieldName]) {         builder.append('{');          for (fieldName in annotationProps) {             if (annotation[fieldName] != null) {                 builder.append('"').append(fieldName).append('": "').append(annotation[fieldName]).append('", ');             }         }          builder.setLength(builder.length() - 2);         builder.append('},');     }      if (builder.length() > 1) {       builder.setLength(builder.length() - 1);     }      builder.append(']');     emit(builder.toString()); }
